title: Nextra Configuration
description: Configuration options for the Nextra Next.js plugin, passed as the argument to the nextra() function in next.config. Controls MDX compilation, search, syntax highlighting, LaTeX, image optimization, and i18n behavior.

defaultShowCopyCode.description: Enable the copy button for all code blocks by default, without needing to set copy=true in the code block metadata. Individual blocks can still disable it with copy=false.

search.description: Option to enable search functionality powered by Pagefind. When enabled, sets the data-pagefind-body attribute on the main element. Can be a boolean or an object controlling code block indexing.

oneOf.description: Pass true to enable search with defaults, false to disable.

codeblocks.description: Whether to index code blocks. When false, adds data-pagefind-ignore="all" to all pre elements.

staticImage.description: Automatically optimize static image imports used with standard Markdown image syntax, e.g. ![alt](/image.png). Uses next/image under the hood.

readingTime.description: Adds estimated reading time of .md and .mdx files using the reading-time package. The value is injected into the page front matter under the readingTime key.

latex.description: Enable LaTeX rendering. Supports KaTeX (server-side, fast) and MathJax (browser-side, more complete). Pass true to use KaTeX with defaults.

oneOf.description: Pass true to enable KaTeX with default options.
Use MathJax renderer with optional configuration.
Use KaTeX renderer with optional configuration.

codeHighlight.description: Enable or disable syntax highlighting for code blocks via Rehype Pretty Code.

items.description: HTML tag name to allow styling override via mdx-components.js.

whiteListTagsStyling.description: Allows you to whitelist HTML elements to be replaced with components defined in the mdx-components.js file. By default only details and summary are replaced.

contentDirBasePath.description: Serve .md and .mdx files from the content directory at a custom path instead of the root (/). Must begin with / and must not end with /.

unstable_shouldAddLocaleToLinks.description: Prefixes locale to all links in the page map information. Useful for i18n setups that do not use Nextra's middleware function.

MathJaxOptions.description: Configuration options for the MathJax renderer.

src.description: URL for MathJax CDN. Defaults to https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com.

MdxOptions.description: Options controlling the MDX compilation pipeline.

rehypePlugins.description: List of rehype plugins to apply during MDX compilation.

remarkPlugins.description: List of remark plugins to apply during MDX compilation.

recmaPlugins.description: List of recma plugins to apply. This is a new ecosystem for transforming esast (JavaScript AST) trees, currently in beta.

format.description: Format of the file. 'md' treats as markdown, 'mdx' treats as MDX, 'detect' auto-detects based on file extension.

rehypePrettyCodeOptions.description: Configuration options for Rehype Pretty Code syntax highlighting. See https://github.com/rehype-pretty/rehype-pretty-code.
